_meta.description: Central manifest of all third-party code vendored directly into this repository — whether as a single inlined file or a full vendor tree. Update this file whenever a vendored component is added, upgraded, or removed. License files must remain in their respective directories; this manifest points to them but does not replace them.

vendored.name: phpquoteshellarg
vendored.reason: Security-hardened shell argument quoting. PHP's native escapeshellarg() corrupts UTF-8 input (e.g. æøå) in processes running a non-UTF-8 locale. This implementation avoids the locale-dependent code path on Unix by wrapping in single quotes unconditionally.

vendored.name: phpmailer/phpmailer
vendored.license_note: LGPL-2.1-only is compatible with GPL-3.0 per FSF guidance. License file at web/inc/vendor/phpmailer/phpmailer/LICENSE.
vendored.reason: Panel email delivery (password reset, 2FA notifications, admin alerts). Build-time vendored to remove Composer as a runtime install dependency.

vendored.name: robthree/twofactorauth
vendored.reason: TOTP secret generation and code verification for 2FA. QR code rendering is handled by the HestiaRE Eigenbau (web/inc/lib/qrcode.php), not by this library.
